findings.description: Pinned package name 'lodahs' (ecosystem=npm) is Levenshtein distance 2 from canonical popular package 'lodash'. Typosquatting risk per Radaro AI-Assisted Development Policy v1.3 §8.2.
findings.fix: Verify 'lodahs' is the package you actually intended to install. If it should be 'lodash', remove 'lodahs' and pin 'lodash' instead.
findings.title: Lockfile pins 'lodahs' looks like typosquat of 'lodash'
